title: Jamie O'Callaghan
extract: Jamie O'Callaghan (born 21 September 1990) is a former Ireland international rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s. He was generally a full-time player for the London Broncos, where he played from 2008 to 2014 and he also signed permanently for both London Skolars and Hemel Stags. He had played for both previously on loan or dual registration but offered little service; having left Skolars to return to Broncos without playing and less than 10 games at Hemel.
